name: recoil_app_init_main_window
description: RecoilApp::InitMainWindow enables the MFC 3D controls path, creates the main frame through the app vtable, publishes the app pointer on the frame, shows the window, and updates it.
known_limits: The smoke verifies the virtual CreateMainWnd dispatch, m_pMainWnd publication, frame m_app write, and ShowWindow/UpdateWindow behavior against a real HWND without invoking the full CZRecoilFrame constructor. Binary-safe verification remains pending for exact MFC call and virtual dispatch code shape.
